name: Instrument Detail Types
abstract: Instrument-specific detail types for ADA analytical techniques. Defines types: detailBasemap, detailARGT, detailDSC, detailEMPA, detailEAIRMS, detailICPOES, detailL2MS, detailLAF, detailNanoIR, detailNanoSIMS, detailPSFD, detailVNMIR, detailQRIS, detailSLS, detailXCT, detailXRD. Uses building blocks: detailBasemap (geochemProperties), detailARGT (geochemProperties), detailDSC (geochemProperties), detailEMPA (geochemProperties), detailEAIRMS (geochemProperties), detailICPOES (geochemProperties), detailL2MS (geochemProperties), detailLAF (geochemProperties), detailNanoIR (geochemProperties), detailNanoSIMS (geochemProperties), detailPSFD (geochemProperties), detailVNMIR (geochemProperties), detailQRIS (geochemProperties), detailSLS (geochemProperties), detailXCT (geochemProperties), detailXRD (geochemProperties).
